ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the data entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of environmental data */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location where data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location where data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental metric */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "verification_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of the last verification */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who verified the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* ISO2 code for the country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Air Quality, Temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., Air, Water) */,
  "data_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the data type (e.g., PM2.5, CO2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., ppm, °C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit (e.g., 1 ppm = 1e-6) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Satellite, Ground Station) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was conducted */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data is valid */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes regarding the quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "check_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Key keywords or tags for the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)
